# Noah Bennett

> Notes on building thoughtful products, navigating frontend architecture, and figuring out what good software really looks like.


- [About](https://miravasquez.dev/me/about.md): A quick intro to me, my tech stack, and how to connect.
- [Experience](https://miravasquez.dev/me/experience.md): Highlights from my career and key roles I've taken on.
- [Craft](https://miravasquez.dev/me/craft.md): A collection of my work.
- [Bookmarks](https://miravasquez.dev/me/bookmarks.md): Bookmarks from my collections.

## Craft

- [Accordion with Image Tooltip](https://pro.ruixen.com/docs/components/accordion-with-image-tooltip)
- [Apple Mega Nav](https://pro.ruixen.com/docs/components/apple-mega-nav)
- [Bloom Text](https://pro.ruixen.com/docs/components/bloom-text)
- [CTA Meteor](https://pro.ruixen.com/docs/components/cta-meteor)
- [Flicker Footer](https://pro.ruixen.com/docs/components/flicker-footer)
- [Hero Bars](https://pro.ruixen.com/docs/components/hero-bars)
- [Hero Mobile Showcase](https://pro.ruixen.com/docs/components/hero-mobile-showcase)
- [Instagram Stories](https://pro.ruixen.com/docs/components/instagram-stories)
- [Map Location Picker](https://pro.ruixen.com/docs/components/map-location-picker)
- [Models Carousel](https://pro.ruixen.com/docs/components/models-carousel)
- [Project Title Morph](https://pro.ruixen.com/docs/components/project-title-morph)
- [Scroll FX Timeline](https://pro.ruixen.com/docs/components/scroll-fx-timeline)
- [Scroll FX](https://pro.ruixen.com/docs/components/scroll-fx)
- [Scroll Split Video Gallery](https://pro.ruixen.com/docs/components/scroll-split-video-gallery)
- [Testimonials Split Tabs](https://pro.ruixen.com/docs/components/testimonials-split-tabs)

This file provides LLM-friendly entry points to Crafts

## Components

- [Book](https://miravasquez.dev/craft/book): A book component for Next.js apps with next-themes and Tailwind CSS, supporting system, light, and dark modes.
- [Game of Life](https://miravasquez.dev/craft/game-of-life): A game of life component for Next.js apps with next-themes and Tailwind CSS, supporting system, light, and dark modes.
- [Magical Mouse](https://miravasquez.dev/craft/magical-mouse): A magical mouse component for Next.js apps with next-themes and Tailwind CSS, supporting system, light, and dark modes.
- [Modern Progress](https://miravasquez.dev/craft/modern-progress): A modern progress component for Next.js apps with next-themes and Tailwind CSS, supporting system, light, and dark modes.
- [Pixel Icon](https://miravasquez.dev/craft/pixel-icon): A pixel icon component for Next.js apps with next-themes and Tailwind CSS, supporting system, light, and dark modes.
- [Split Text Effect](https://miravasquez.dev/craft/split-text-effect): A split text effect component for Next.js apps with next-themes and Tailwind CSS, supporting system, light, and dark modes.
- [View Magnifier](https://miravasquez.dev/craft/view-magnifier): A view magnifier component for Next.js apps with next-themes and Tailwind CSS, supporting system, light, and dark modes.

## Examples

- [Book Demo](https://github.com/ruixenui/portfolio/blob/main/registry/example/book-demo.tsx): Example usage

- [Modern Progress Demo](https://github.com/ruixenui/portfolio/blob/main/registry/example/modern-progress-demo.tsx): Example usage
- [Pixel Icon Demo](https://github.com/ruixenui/portfolio/blob/main/registry/example/pixel-icon-demo.tsx): Example usage
- [Split Text Effect Demo](https://github.com/ruixenui/portfolio/blob/main/registry/example/split-text-effect-demo.tsx): Example usage
- [Split Text Effect Demo 2](https://github.com/ruixenui/portfolio/blob/main/registry/example/split-text-effect-demo-2.tsx): Example usage
- [Split Text Effect Demo 3](https://github.com/ruixenui/portfolio/blob/main/registry/example/split-text-effect-demo-3.tsx): Example usage
- [View Magnifier Demo](https://github.com/ruixenui/portfolio/blob/main/registry/example/view-magnifier-demo.tsx): Example usage
